name: Stir-Fried Snow Peas (Disney Kids)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh snow peas (rinsed and stems removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan or wok, warm the sesame oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ginger, snow peas, water chestnuts, and soy sauce.
3. Stir-fry for about 3 to 5 minutes, or until the peas turn bright green.
4. Serve 4 to 6 people.
